result:
If I could change one thing, I’d make it so everyone had guaranteed access to high-quality education.

Not just school access—but real learning: critical thinking, emotional skills, media literacy, practical life skills, and the freedom to keep learning throughout life. Education is one of the few changes that improves nearly everything else: health, equality, income, civic participation, innovation, and even conflict reduction.

If people are empowered to think clearly and compassionately, they can solve most other problems together.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
